commit.message:
Add Insider Transactions section to company page via SEC EDGAR

Fetches Form 4 filings from SEC EDGAR public API:
- CIK lookup via company_tickers.json (cached 1h)
- Filing list from submissions endpoint, filtered for Form 4
- Parses Form 4 XML to extract insider name, role, transaction
  type (Buy/Sell), shares, price per share, and date
- Shows last 10 transactions in a responsive table
- Summary badge: "Net Insider Buying" (green) or "Net Insider
  Selling" (red) based on last 90 days activity
- Client component with loading/error states, collapsible panel

New files:
- src/lib/sec.ts — SEC EDGAR API client
- src/app/api/insider/route.ts — GET /api/insider?ticker=AAPL
- src/app/company/[ticker]/InsiderTransactions.tsx — UI component

commit.message:
Architecture improvements: 4-phase remediation (#9)

* Security hardening from code review findings

- Run container as non-root user (appuser) in Dockerfile
- Pin all GitHub Actions to commit SHAs across 3 workflows
- Add top-level permissions: contents: read to CI workflow
- Protect /metrics endpoint with optional METRICS_SECRET token
- Add resource limits and no-new-privileges to docker-compose
- Extend .gitignore with secret file patterns (.pem, .key, etc.)
- Document per-worker rate limit caveat in api_v1.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Phase 1: Fix bugs — thread safety, XSS, indexes, dead code, config

- Add threading lock to _claude_title_call_count in job_matcher.py
- Add escapeHtml() utility and sanitize all innerHTML with user data
- Add missing DB indexes: applied_jobs(user_id,stage), saved_searches(user_id,is_active), search_history(user_id)
- Remove dead _deduplicate() function and unused SequenceMatcher import
- Add try/except for SMTP_PORT int conversion in config.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Phase 2: Extract helpers — resume loader, constants, provider cache

- Create services/resume_loader.py with require_resume() and load_resume_or_empty()
- Replace 9 duplicate resume-loading patterns in app.py with shared helpers
- Create services/constants.py with shared STOP_WORDS and PIPELINE_STAGES
- Update analytics.py and resume_tailor.py to use shared stop words
- Cache provider instances in registry.py instead of recreating per search

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Phase 3: Extract 80+ routes into 8 Flask blueprints

Split monolithic app.py (2568 lines) into focused blueprint modules:
- auth (8 routes), jobs (32 routes), search (4 routes), pipeline (7 routes)
- resumes (8 routes), teams (8 routes), settings (9 routes), admin (2 routes)

App.py retains core setup, middleware, error handlers, and ~17 routes
(index, dashboard, alerts, analytics, etc.). All url_for references
updated across 24 templates. Rate limiting preserved via init functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Phase 4: Infrastructure hardening — scheduler shutdown, split requirements

- Add graceful scheduler shutdown via atexit handler
- Split requirements.txt: prod deps only, pytest moved to requirements-dev.txt
- CI workflow updated to use requirements-dev.txt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Harden docker-compose and gitignore .claude directory

- Drop all Linux capabilities (cap_drop: ALL), no cap_add needed
- Read-only root filesystem with tmpfs for /tmp
- no-new-privileges security opt
- 2 CPU / 512M memory limits
- Add .claude/ to gitignore, remove tracked settings file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix test failure and deduplicate helpers

- Remove test for deleted _deduplicate function (broke CI)
- Extract _safe_int() and RESULTS_PER_PAGE to services/constants.py
  (was triplicated across app.py, search.py, settings.py)
- Use PIPELINE_STAGES constant in kanban route instead of hardcoded list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix create_saved_search missing skills_json argument

The alerts route was calling create_saved_search() without the required
skills_json parameter, causing test failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

学習資料の初学者向け改善: BIZ・ML・DE・DSトピックの説明を充実

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(runner): project_bank resolution, TaskCreate tools, signal dedup

Three fixes to pipeline_runner.py:

1. CLAUDE_PROJECT_BANK now derived from target_dir (the project being
   worked on) instead of repo root (the harness). Supports explicit
   `project_bank` DOT graph attribute for override. Fixes workers using
   wrong Hindsight bank when runner lives in harness but edits cross-repo.

2. Replace legacy TodoWrite with TaskCreate/TaskUpdate/TaskList/TaskGet
   in _BASE_TOOLS. These are the current task tracking tools with richer
   features (dependencies, owners, status spinners).

3. Fix double validation dispatch and timeout-overwrites-pass bugs:
   - SDK completion handler now checks node status before writing signal
     (skips if node already past 'active' — worker wrote signal in-flight)
   - Validation timeout handler checks node status before writing fail
     (skips if node already 'validated' — validation passed via Write tool
     but SDK call hadn't completed before 600s timeout)

Root cause evidence: Logfire trace 019cda11adf835f209e0a768a478001a
showed voice_agent_model getting pass→pass→fail sequence because
timeout handler overwrote validation pass after 600s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use enhanced grayscale tiles for Claude + wider crop margins + smarter bottom detection

- Use enhanced grayscale (not B&W) for Claude Vision tiles: B&W thresholding
  destroys character anti-aliasing that vision models use to distinguish
  similar chars (0/O, 1/I, S/5, B/8). Keep B&W only for Tesseract OCR.
- Contrast 2x + Sharpness 3x on grayscale crop before tiling
- Crop X margins: 60→200px on each side to capture edge columns (QTY)
  that may not have been detected by header OCR
- Bottom detection: require ALL three scan columns (L/C/R) to agree on
  a white gap, min_gap 60→120px to ignore intra-table row separators
  and only trigger on true end-of-table whitespace
- Rotate grayscale image alongside B&W during rotation correction
- Clean up img_gray in loop memory management

commit.message:
fix(pipeline): production-readiness audit — retry errors, context guards, DRY helpers

Bug fixes:
- Retry exception handler now emits typed error events with stage tracking
  instead of silently breaking (dangling 'started' stages no longer possible)
- format_file_contexts filters None/empty content (was injecting literal
  "None" string into LLM prompts); mirrors format_url_contexts guard
- Standardized validation.get("scores", {}) fallback across initial and
  retry score extraction (was inconsistent: validation vs empty dict)

DRY / type safety:
- Extracted format_instructions() into context_builders.py; replaced
  3 identical inline implementations in analyzer, strategy, optimizer
- Made cap constants public (MAX_FILE_CONTEXTS, MAX_URL_CONTEXTS,
  MAX_INSTRUCTIONS); pipeline imports them instead of hardcoding 5/3/10
- Unified Optional[X] → X | None across pipeline.py signature
- Documented _estimate_tokens heuristic with reconciliation TODO

Tests: 12 new cases covering retry error emission, format_file_contexts
edge cases, format_instructions helper, and context builder quality flags.

Housekeeping: gitignore docs/superpowers/ (dev session artifacts).

commit.message:
fix: bake NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL into frontend Docker image at build time

Next.js 15 standalone mode embeds rewrite destinations in
routes-manifest.json at build time — runtime env vars have no effect.
Pass NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://backend:3001 as a build ARG so the
proxy rewrite reaches the backend container correctly.

commit.message:
feat(s5): payout monitor — stuck detection job (STA-156) (#161)

* feat(s5): payout monitor — stuck detection job (STA-156)

Add scheduled job that detects stuck payouts (PAYOUT_INITIATED or
PAYOUT_PROCESSING older than 2 hours) and escalates them to
PAYOUT_FAILED → MANUAL_REVIEW with FiatPayoutFailed event publishing.

- PayoutMonitorJob: @Scheduled every 5min, @ConditionalOnProperty toggle
- PayoutMonitorCommandHandler: per-order TX isolation (REQUIRES_NEW)
- PayoutMonitorConfig: @ConfigurationProperties for threshold/interval
- PayoutMonitorProperties: domain port for config
- ClockConfig: standalone Clock bean (always available)
- 6 unit tests covering stuck initiated/processing, recent skip, empty

Closes STA-156

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(s5): address CodeRabbit review — TOCTOU guard, batch resilience, cached TX template (STA-156)

- Re-fetch order inside REQUIRES_NEW transaction to guard against TOCTOU
  races (e.g. webhook settling a payout between query and escalation)
- Skip escalation if order status changed since initial query
- Wrap per-order escalation in try-catch so one failure doesn't abort batch
- Cache TransactionTemplate as field instead of creating per invocation
- Add TOCTOU guard test (order already completed → skip)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix RPE thresholds based on strength training research

- <6 LIGHT: room to push harder
- 6-7.5 BUILDING: hypertrophy zone, sustainable
- 7.5-8.5 DIALED IN: sweet spot for strength (was incorrectly flagged)
- 8.5-9.5 HEAVY BLOCK: fine short-term, plan deload within 2-3 weeks
- 9.5+ BACK OFF: grinding near failure, injury risk elevated
- Updated gauge zones to match corrected thresholds
- 8.4 avg now correctly shows "DIALED IN" not "BACK OFF"

commit.message:
feat: migrar a v2 — arquitectura híbrida con 16 agentes especializados

Rediseño completo del sistema vibecoding:
- 16 agentes especializados (orquestador + 15 subagentes) reemplazando los 6 anteriores
- Pipeline de 5 fases: Planificación → Arquitectura → Dev/QA Loop → Certificación → Publicación
- Integración con Engram MCP para memoria persistente y DAG State
- Nuevos agentes: project-manager-senior, ux-architect, ui-designer, security-engineer,
  frontend-developer, backend-architect, rapid-prototyper, game-designer,
  xr-immersive-developer, evidence-collector, reality-checker, api-tester,
  performance-benchmarker
- Eliminados agentes legacy: builder, librarian, ops, qa, techlead, task-planner, skills/
- Templates actualizados: settings.json y settings.local.json con 51 permisos
- Orquestador nunca hace trabajo real, solo coordina (regla de oro)
- QA visual con Playwright MCP, screenshots a disco, loop 3 reintentos
- Git y deploy solo con confirmación explícita del usuario

revert: remove scope_type migration (key column cannot be updated)

ClickHouse doesn't allow UPDATE on key columns, and scope_type is part
of the ORDER BY clause in audit_logs and k8s_events tables.

The code fix for PascalCase is working — new data is stored correctly.
Old data will age out via TTL (60-90 days).

This reverts the migration added in #99.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add timeout guards to SWE-bench Pro test.sh verifiers

Jest/npm/pytest/go test commands in 5 task verifiers had no timeout,
causing indefinite hangs when individual tests stall (observed:
InteractiveAuthDialog-test.ts hung >2h in element-web task).

Adds `timeout 600` (10min) wrapper to all affected test runners.
Also adds `--forceExit` to jest commands to kill workers immediately
when tests complete (prevents jest from waiting for open handles).

Affected tasks:
- element-web-roomheaderbuttons-can-crash-fix-001 (jest)
- element-web-unread-indicators-diverge-fix-001 (jest)
- vscode-stale-diagnostics-feat-001 (npm test)
- ansible-abc-imports-fix-001 (pytest)
- teleport-users-can-delete-fix-001 (go test)
